latest_evidence_summary: OpenNori report rendering now keeps the Acceptance Status table compact and moves long user stories, measurement, thresholds, evidence summary, multiple sources, reviewability, and limitations into per-criterion Acceptance Details blocks. The reporting test creates a long Chinese AC with command/path/url sources and asserts the old oversized table columns are gone, the compact table is present, sources render as a list, and no generated report line exceeds 240 characters.
